title: ProDec 10 litre (2 gallon) Medium Plastic Paint Scuttle Bucket 100% Recycled Plastic With Metal Carry Handle for All Types of Paint and Paste, Suitable For Up To 9" Rollers
features: Robust plastic paint scuttle made from 100% recycled plastic
Holds up to 10 litres (2 gallons) of paint, varnish or woodstain for faster, more efficient application than a tray
Suitable for paint rollers up to 9" (225mm) wide
Graduated markings in both litres and gallons
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Liners also available Disposable liners are also available for all ProDec scuttle sizes. Quick & easy colour changes No need to wash your scuttle - prevents paint entering drains Tie handles also keep paint wet during breaks Keeps scuttles cleaner for longer Scuttles - tools of the trade A favourite with trade professionals, scuttles hold much more paint than trays, meaning that unlike trays you don't have to regularly reload them, enabling you to work more quickly and efficiently. ProDec scuttles are available in the following capacities: 2.5 litres (0.5 gallons) - for 4" mini rollers 5 litres (1 gallon) - for 4" & 6" mini rollers 10 litres (2 gallons) - up to 9" wide rollers 15 litres (3 gallons) - up to 12" wide rollers 25 litres (5 gallons) - up to 15" wide rollers KEY FEATURES 100% recycled plastic All ProDec scuttles are made using 100% recycled plastic, re-purposing post-consumer waste to be better for the environment. Robust construction Cast from injection moulded plastic, ProDec scuttles feature a wide, low base with strong walls, giving a robust construction with a low centre of gravity. Graduated markings With graduated markings in both litres and gallons, you can easily measure out the right amount and keep track of how much you're using for each wall, room or project. Sturdy carry handle Made from strong wire, the handle enables easy carrying of the scuttle without worrying about the risk of dropping and spilling paint, coping readily even when it's full of paint. ALSO AVAILABLE - disposable scuttle liners for quick, mess free paint changes in 3 simple steps. Moulded liners fit snugly into your ProDec scuttle When you're finished painting, simply ease the liner away from the scuttle... ...tie the handles off and dispose of safely.
